technical_feasibility.label: Technical Feasibility
technical_feasibility.description: Is the proposed approach technically sound? Are the technologies proven and viable?

integration_compatibility.label: Integration & Compatibility
integration_compatibility.description: Interfaces, data flows, and dependencies with existing systems. Landscape fit and architectural coherence.

infrastructure_needs.label: Infrastructure Needs
infrastructure_needs.description: Platform, network, hosting, and operations requirements.

security_compliance.label: Security & Compliance
security_compliance.description: Security posture impacts, legal obligations, and control requirements.

resource_skills.label: Resource & Skills
resource_skills.description: Capacity, ownership, expertise, and vendor availability.

delivery_constraints.label: Delivery Constraints
delivery_constraints.description: External dependencies, windows, lead times, and sequencing constraints.

change_management.label: Change Management
change_management.description: Adoption, communication, process changes, and training implications.

hints.infrastructure: Focus on resilience, capacity, change windows, rollback readiness, and support model fit.
hints.businessApplications: Focus on business-process fit, data quality or migration impact, integrations, and user adoption readiness.
hints.security: Focus on threat reduction, control coverage, regulatory urgency, and residual risk acceptance.
hints.default: Keep comments short and concrete: key concern, impact, and required action.

scoring.title: Evaluation Criteria
scoring.mandatoryBypassDescription: When enabled, requests with the flagged mandatory item receive a priority score of 100, regardless of other criteria. Manual override is blocked.
scoring.empty: No evaluation criteria configured yet. Add criteria to enable request scoring.

dialog.scaleValuesDescription: For non-inverted criteria: first value = lowest score, last value = highest score. For inverted criteria: first value = highest score, last value = lowest score.

scoring.confirmDelete: Delete this criterion? Existing evaluations will be removed.

phaseTemplates.empty: No phase templates configured yet. Templates will be automatically seeded when first accessed.
phaseTemplates.description: Phase templates define the standard phases and milestones for projects. Apply a template when setting up a new project's timeline.

dialog.phasesDescription: Define the phases for this template. Each phase can optionally have a milestone that gets created when the template is applied.

classification.description: Configure sources, categories, and streams for classifying requests and projects.

confirmations.deleteCategory: Delete this category and all its streams?

teams.empty: No teams configured yet. Use Seed Defaults to populate with standard teams, or add teams manually.
teams.description: Teams are organizational groups that contributors belong to. Assign contributors to teams to organize them by department or function.
